subcodes.first_line: The copy of the address which you delivered before the Peace Congress was received. Truly, I way thou art a ransom
subcodes.first_line_orig: نسخه خطابه شما در کونگرس رسید فی الحقیقه فداای جمال مبارکی هیچ فکری و ذکری
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
